news.title:
Promoters of Rane Holdings Ltd bought 11,550 shares in the open market.
Harish Lakshman purchased 4,750 shares, Malavika Lakshman 6,800 shares, raising holdings by 0.39%.
news.summary:
Promoters of Rane Holdings Ltd bought 11,550 shares in the open market.
Harish Lakshman purchased 4,750 shares, Malavika Lakshman 6,800 shares, raising holdings by 0.39%.

news.title:
Rane Holdings' subsidiary faces a tax penalty of Rs. 3.63cr and demand of Rs. 6.74cr.
The penalty relates to FY 2014-15 reassessment; an appeal will be filed.
news.summary:
Rane Holdings' subsidiary faces a tax penalty of Rs. 3.63cr and demand of Rs. 6.74cr.
The penalty relates to FY 2014-15 reassessment; an appeal will be filed.

news.title:
Rane Steering Systems faces INR 6.74 Cr tax demand; ITAT orders fresh hearing.
Issues include jurisdiction and disallowance of revenue expenses; docs to be presented.
news.summary:
Rane Steering Systems faces INR 6.74 Cr tax demand; ITAT orders fresh hearing.
Issues include jurisdiction and disallowance of revenue expenses; docs to be presented.

news.title: Rane Holdings shares sold: 77,795 at avg price of ₹1173.
news.summary: Rane Holdings shares sold: 77,795 at avg price of ₹1173.

news.title: Rane Holdings aims for double-digit EBITDA margins with Rs 600 Cr capex over 3 years.
news.summary: Rane Holdings aims for double-digit EBITDA margins with Rs 600 Cr capex over 3 years.

news.title:
Rane Holdings Ltd's board approved unaudited standalone and consolidated financial results for Q3 and nine months ended Dec 31, 2025.
Key highlights include profit for the period at Rs. 6,261 lakhs and total income of Rs. 13,311 lakhs, alongside commission proposals for directors.
news.summary:
Rane Holdings Ltd's board approved unaudited standalone and consolidated financial results for Q3 and nine months ended Dec 31, 2025.
Key highlights include profit for the period at Rs. 6,261 lakhs and total income of Rs. 13,311 lakhs, alongside commission proposals for directors.

news.title:
India's auto component sector gains with US granting preferential tariff rate quota, easing export pressures.
Stocks like SAMIL, Bharat Forge, and Uno Minda benefit, boosting competitiveness and strategic India-US trade ties.
news.summary:
India's auto component sector gains with US granting preferential tariff rate quota, easing export pressures.
Stocks like SAMIL, Bharat Forge, and Uno Minda benefit, boosting competitiveness and strategic India-US trade ties.

news.title:
Rane Holdings' finance committee approved a Rs.15 Cr short-term loan.
Total outstanding loans to subsidiary now Rs.40 Cr for operational use.
news.summary:
Rane Holdings' finance committee approved a Rs.15 Cr short-term loan.
Total outstanding loans to subsidiary now Rs.40 Cr for operational use.

news.title:
Rane Holdings acquires 49% stake in ZF Lifetec Rane Automotive India via demerger.
Acquisition involves 42.8 lakh shares; ZLRAI focuses on occupant safety systems.
news.summary:
Rane Holdings acquires 49% stake in ZF Lifetec Rane Automotive India via demerger.
Acquisition involves 42.8 lakh shares; ZLRAI focuses on occupant safety systems.

news.title:
Rane Holdings' subsidiary faces a tax transfer pricing order with a Rs. 2.33 Cr adjustment.
The financial impact is estimated at Rs. 0.59 Cr, excluding interest and penalties.
news.summary:
Rane Holdings' subsidiary faces a tax transfer pricing order with a Rs. 2.33 Cr adjustment.
The financial impact is estimated at Rs. 0.59 Cr, excluding interest and penalties.

news.title:
Rane Holdings disclosed inter-se transfer of shares among promoters per SEBI rules.
Key transactions: Rathika R Sundaresan sold 52,500 shares; Ganesh L and Harish Lakshman each bought 26,250 shares.
news.summary:
Rane Holdings disclosed inter-se transfer of shares among promoters per SEBI rules.
Key transactions: Rathika R Sundaresan sold 52,500 shares; Ganesh L and Harish Lakshman each bought 26,250 shares.

news.title: Rane Holdings' Board to meet on 14 February 2026 to discuss results.
news.summary: Rane Holdings' Board to meet on 14 February 2026 to discuss results.

news.title:
Rane Holdings Ltd's Rs.100 Cr bank loans reaffirmed by ICRA with AA- (Stable) for long-term and A1+ for short-term ratings.
ICRA rated Rs.75 Cr term loan and Rs.5 Cr cash credit as AA- (Stable), and Rs.20 Cr unallocated limits as AA- (Stable)/A1+.
news.summary:
Rane Holdings Ltd's Rs.100 Cr bank loans reaffirmed by ICRA with AA- (Stable) for long-term and A1+ for short-term ratings.
ICRA rated Rs.75 Cr term loan and Rs.5 Cr cash credit as AA- (Stable), and Rs.20 Cr unallocated limits as AA- (Stable)/A1+.

news.title:
Rane Group secures ₹500-cr orders in Q2 FY26 across 3 companies.
Rane Madras wins ₹200-cr steering and linkages business orders.
news.summary:
Rane Group secures ₹500-cr orders in Q2 FY26 across 3 companies.
Rane Madras wins ₹200-cr steering and linkages business orders.

news.title:
Rane Holdings released transcript of Nov 18, 2025 earnings call.
Transcript is available on company's website under investor section.
news.summary:
Rane Holdings released transcript of Nov 18, 2025 earnings call.
Transcript is available on company's website under investor section.

news.title:
Rane Holdings Ltd held an earnings conference call on Nov 18, 2025.
Audio recordings of the call are available on the Rane Group website for investor review.
news.summary:
Rane Holdings Ltd held an earnings conference call on Nov 18, 2025.
Audio recordings of the call are available on the Rane Group website for investor review.

news.title: Rane Holdings reported Q2 revenue of 13.9B rupees, up from 9.2B YoY.
news.summary: Rane Holdings reported Q2 revenue of 13.9B rupees, up from 9.2B YoY.

news.title:
Rane Holdings faced a tax demand of ₹20.21 Cr, later reduced to ₹1.09 Lakhs.
The demand pertains to ITC discrepancies for 2021-22; company will pay within timeline.
news.summary:
Rane Holdings faced a tax demand of ₹20.21 Cr, later reduced to ₹1.09 Lakhs.
The demand pertains to ITC discrepancies for 2021-22; company will pay within timeline.

news.title:
Rane Holdings Ltd approves Rs.25 Cr short-term loan to subsidiary RSSL for operational needs.
Loan agreement is unsecured, at arm's length, with monthly interest and a 1-year term.
news.summary:
Rane Holdings Ltd approves Rs.25 Cr short-term loan to subsidiary RSSL for operational needs.
Loan agreement is unsecured, at arm's length, with monthly interest and a 1-year term.
